 ,ATTRIBUTE22             
 ,ATTRIBUTE23             
 ,ATTRIBUTE24             
 ,ATTRIBUTE25             
 ,ATTRIBUTE26             
 ,ATTRIBUTE27             
 ,ATTRIBUTE28             
 ,ATTRIBUTE29             
 ,ATTRIBUTE30             
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE31        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE32        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE33        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE34        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE35        
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE36         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE37         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE38         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE39         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE40         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE41         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE42         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE43         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE44         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE45       
,TRAIL_FILE_NAME
,SOURCE_DML_TYPE
,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
,REFRESH_DATETIME
,PROCESSED_FLAG
,'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL   DIST 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR
   ON DIST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
   WHERE   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO OFFER ATTRIBUTION','CISCO TWO TIER','CISCO OPEN RMA','REVENUE ATTRIBUTION')
   AND EFAR.LANG = 'US'
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$WORKDB.W_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI W_ROL
        WHERE DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID=W_ROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT )

SELECT 
SMRA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY    ,
DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT     ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_HEADER_ID, -999)    AS SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT         ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_LINE_NUM, -999)        AS SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT                              ,
COALESCE(DIST.TRANSACTION_ID, -999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT ,
COALESCE(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY, -999) ,
COALESCE(NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, -999),
COALESCE(NECALUT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01') AS GL_DT       ,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' ) AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                AS SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
-999 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
COALESCE(DIST.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY             ,
'UNKNOWN' AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD            ,
COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995)  AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY       ,
COALESCE(EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK')                 ,
COALESCE(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, -999)             ,
-999 AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT        ,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,DATE '3500-01-01') AS GL_POSTED_DT,
-999 AS PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD   ,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD        ,
-999 AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT   ,	
'UNKNOWN' AS ELEMENT_TYPE_CD               ,
COALESCE(DIST.APPLICATION_ID, -999) AS BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
-999 AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY    ,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRX_SRC_CD                    ,
-999 AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      ,
'UNKNOWN' AS ATTRIBUTION_CD                ,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID               ,
'CG' AS SS_CD                 ,
'UNKNOWN' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,  
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM           ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER          ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM           ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
'UNKNOWN' AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE   ,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL  DIST
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
 ON (DIST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
       AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO TWO TIER'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US') 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMRA 
  ON (SMRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  =DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR XAH
  ON ( XAH.AE_HEADER_ID=DIST.AE_HEADER_ID
  AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=DIST.APPLICATION_ID
AND XAH.GLOBAL_NAME=DIST.GLOBAL_NAME
AND XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=CAST(COALESCE (DIST.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS INTEGER)
AND NATL.SS_CODE=DIST.GLOBAL_NAME
)
/*SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS REPLACED BY SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV NECALUT
ON CAST(CAST(DIST.PARTY_SITE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)) = NECALUT.SK_SITE_USE_ID
AND NECALUT.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE = 'BILL_TO'
AND NECALUT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
ON NECALUT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = CAT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'

 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON ( NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = DIST.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
ON cast(DIST.ORDER_NUMBER as INTEGER) = NSOVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSOVT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    
  ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID    
    AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
	
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SMRA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY    ,
DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT     ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_HEADER_ID, -999)    AS SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT         ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_LINE_NUM, -999)        AS SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT                              ,
COALESCE(DIST.TRANSACTION_ID, -999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT ,
COALESCE(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY, -999) ,
COALESCE(NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, -999),
COALESCE(NECALUT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS GL_DT       ,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' ) AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                AS SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
-999 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
COALESCE(DIST.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY             ,
'UNKNOWN' AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD            ,
COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995)  AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY       ,
COALESCE(EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK')                 ,
COALESCE(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, -999)             ,
-999 AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT        ,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,DATE '3500-01-01') AS GL_POSTED_DT,
-999 AS PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
'UNKNOWN' AS MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD   ,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD        ,
-999 AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT   ,
'UNKNOWN' AS ELEMENT_TYPE_CD               ,
COALESCE(DIST.APPLICATION_ID, -999) AS BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
-999 AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY    ,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRX_SRC_CD                    ,
-999 AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT      ,
'UNKNOWN' AS ATTRIBUTION_CD                ,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID               ,
'CG' AS SS_CD                 ,
'UNKNOWN' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,  
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM           ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER          ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM           ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
'UNKNOWN' AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE   ,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ROL DIST
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
 ON (DIST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
       AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO TWO TIER'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US')  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMRA 
  ON (SMRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  =DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID)
  
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR XAH
  ON  ( XAH.AE_HEADER_ID=DIST.AE_HEADER_ID
  AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=DIST.APPLICATION_ID
AND XAH.GLOBAL_NAME=DIST.GLOBAL_NAME
AND XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
  )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=CAST(COALESCE (DIST.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS INTEGER)
AND NATL.SS_CODE=DIST.GLOBAL_NAME
)
/*SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS REPLACED BY SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV NECALUT
ON CAST(CAST(DIST.PARTY_SITE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)) = NECALUT.SK_SITE_USE_ID
AND NECALUT.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE = 'BILL_TO'
AND NECALUT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV CAT
ON NECALUT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = CAT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
AND CAT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'

 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON ( NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = DIST.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
ON cast(DIST.ORDER_NUMBER as INTEGER) = NSOVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSOVT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    
  ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID    
    AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')

SELECT 
SMRA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY   , 
DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT     ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_HEADER_ID, -999)  AS SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT         ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_LINE_NUM, -999)  AS SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT                              ,
COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE2, -999)  AS SK_TRX_ID_INT ,
COALESCE(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY, -999) ,
CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN  -7777     ELSE NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-999 AS BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS GL_DT,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
-999 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-7777  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY,
COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
COALESCE(EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK'),
COALESCE(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, -999),
COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE7,-999) AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE, DATE'3500-01-01') AS GL_POSTED_DT,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CODE,/*ATTRIBUTE13 IS CHANGED TO ATTRIBUTE8 */
-999 AS SUBSCRIPTION_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS ELEMENT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(DIST.APPLICATION_ID,-999) AS BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
-999 AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOWN') AS TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,-9999)  AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
'OFFSET'  AS ATTRIBUTION_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS  BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
'CG' AS  SS_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,  
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM           
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER          
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM           
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
,'UNKNOWN' AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE  , 
CASE WHEN NRT.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL  DIST
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
  ON (DIST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
        AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO OFFER ATTRIBUTION'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US')
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMRA 
ON (SMRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = CAST(DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS INTEGER))
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_OA_S XAH
ON ( XAH.AE_HEADER_ID=DIST.AE_HEADER_ID
AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A' 
AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=DIST.APPLICATION_ID
AND XAH.GLOBAL_NAME=DIST.GLOBAL_NAME
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE2=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2
 AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=DIST.APPLICATION_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(DIST.ATTRIBUTE3=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AND 
SAT.SS_CODE = 'CG')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    
ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID   
AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NRT
ON NRT.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMRA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
SMRA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY   , 
DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT     ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_HEADER_ID, -999)  AS SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT         ,
COALESCE(DIST.AE_LINE_NUM, -999)  AS SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT                              ,
COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE2, -999)  AS SK_TRX_ID_INT ,
COALESCE(NAT.AR_TRX_KEY, -999) ,
CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN  -7777     ELSE NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-999 AS BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS GL_DT,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
-999 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-7777  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY,
COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
COALESCE(EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK'),
COALESCE(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, -999),
COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE7,-999) AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE, DATE'3500-01-01') AS GL_POSTED_DT,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CODE,/*ATTRIBUTE13 IS CHANGED TO ATTRIBUTE8 */
-999 AS SUBSCRIPTION_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS ELEMENT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(DIST.APPLICATION_ID,-999) AS BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
-999 AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOWN') AS TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,-9999)  AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
'OFFSET'  AS ATTRIBUTION_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS  BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
'CG' AS  SS_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,  
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM           
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER          
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM           
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
,'UNKNOWN' AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE  , 
CASE WHEN NRT.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ROL   DIST
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
  ON (DIST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
        AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO OFFER ATTRIBUTION'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US')
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMRA 
ON (SMRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = CAST(DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS INTEGER))

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_OA_S XAH
ON  (DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID
AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A' 
AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=DIST.APPLICATION_ID
AND XAH.GLOBAL_NAME=DIST.GLOBAL_NAME
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)


INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE2=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2
 AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=DIST.APPLICATION_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(DIST.ATTRIBUTE3=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AND 
SAT.SS_CODE = 'CG')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    
ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID   
AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NRT
ON NRT.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMRA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY

UNION ALL

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMRA 
ON (SMRA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  =DIST_EX.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR_RT XAH
ON (XAH.AE_HEADER_ID=DIST_EX.AE_HEADER_ID
AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=DIST_EX.APPLICATION_ID
AND XAH.GLOBAL_NAME=DIST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)


LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = CAST(COALESCE (DIST_EX.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS INTEGER) and 
NATL.SS_CODE=DIST_EX.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST_EX.LEDGER_ID)

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_ALL_RT  XXCFI
ON (DIST_EX.TRANSACTION_ID=XXCFI.TRANSACTION_ID)

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    
ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST_EX.CCID    
AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(DIST_EX.ATTRIBUTE1=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NRT
ON NRT.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMRA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
WHERE XXCFI.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'XAAS'
